summary:
Lint complete. Here's a summary of everything fixed across all four passes:

**Pass 1 — Structural Integrity (19 fixes)**
- Fixed index header: entity count 71 → 63, date → 2026-05-02
- Removed duplicate `multiworld` row; added missing `agent-world` row
- Fixed 8 paper frontmatters removing nonexistent topic references (robotics, style-transfer, skill-evolution, character-animation, gui-agents, debugging, self-evolution)
- Fixed 16 stale index topic paper_counts to match actual topic pages
- Fixed grpo paper_count in index: 5 → 6

**Pass 2 — Wrong & Duplicate Info (4 fixes)**
- Added `type: idea` to 3 idea pages missing it
- Fixed llm-efficiency Evolution prose (removed stale MEDS reference)
- No duplicate pages, no people in entities/, no factual inconsistencies found

**Pass 3 — Connection Quality (3 fixes)**
- Added reciprocal connection MEDS → RLSD
- Added reciprocal connection HY-Embodied-0.5 → SpatialEvo
- Added reciprocal connection KnowRL → 2604.18574
- All topic pages have Evolution and Patterns & Insights sections; no shallow annotations found

**Pass 4 — Index & Log**
- Index rebuilt with accurate counts: 42 papers, 25 topics, 63 entities, 9 ideas
- Duplicate [2026-04-28] log entry removed; missing [2026-04-20] ingest header added
- New [2026-05-02] lint entry appended to log.md
